label.description: Short general action KIND name, at most 4 words (becomes the URI; case detail goes in description)

agent.description: Person and role performing the action

temporal_marker.description: When the action occurred (the textual when)

guiding_principles.description: Labels of Principles extracted for this case; a motive word (Speed, Efficiency) is invalid; empty when no extracted principle guided the action

ethical_context.description: Obligation engagement + guiding principles, resolved downstream to fulfillsObligation / violatesObligation / guidedByPrinciple edges

initiates.description: States (fluents) the action brings into holding; resolve to the initiates edge (Action->State)

terminates.description: States (fluents) the action ends; never a state the same action initiates; resolve to the terminates edge (Action->State)

temporal_extent.description: 'instant' for a point occurrence or 'interval' for one extending over a period (anchors OWL-Time)

text_references.description: Verbatim quotes grounding this action; each an EXACT contiguous span copied from the case text, never a paraphrase or stitched fragment (stored as proeth:textReferences)

actions.description: Action occurrences in the case (volitional professional decisions); individuals only, no action classes and no topical action_type taxonomy (ONT-4)

section_type.description: Actions run in a single Step-3 pass (no facts/discussion split)

action_definition.source: OntServe proethica-core.ttl core:Action iao:0000115 + iao:0000116 via concept_ontology_slots -> _component_definition_block('Action')
action_definition.description: Governing definitional anchor: the ontology iao:0000115 definition plus the iao:0000116 extraction framing, citation-trimmed at injection (the generalized Role definition pattern)

action_boundary.description: Ontology-derived disjointness boundary (what an Action is not)

pass_directive.source: _augment_pass_directive in prompt_variable_resolver (no per-pass base for actions)
pass_directive.description: Shared cross-component directives: no-fabrication, actor-scope, quote fidelity (single-pass component, so the slot carries only the shared block)

all.name: Actions (Step 3)
all.description: Extract action occurrences (volitional professional decisions) from the case in a single Step-3 pass (individuals only; no action classes). NOTE: the live Step-3 LangGraph path builds its action prompt in app/services/temporal_dynamics/extractors/action_extractor.py (the editable-prompt exception); this seeded template is the single-source field contract and prompt-editor surface, not the live runtime prompt.
